$wpdb->get_col("SELECT MIN(id) FROM $wpgmza_tblname GROUP BY map_id, lat, lng, address, title, link, description")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(id) FROM $wpgmza_tblname WHERE latlng IS NULL LIMIT 1")

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT *, {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}AsText(cornerA) AS cornerA, {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}AsText(cornerB) AS cornerB FROM $wpgmza_tblname_rectangles WHERE id = $rectangle_id")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, map_title FROM $WPGMZA_TABLE_NAME_MAPS WHERE active = 0 ORDER BY id ASC")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, map_title FROM $WPGMZA_TABLE_NAME_MAPS WHERE active = 0 ORDER BY id ASC")

$wpdb->get_row("
			SELECT * FROM $wpgmza_tblname_categories
			WHERE id IN (" . implode(',', $ids) . ")
			AND active = 0
			ORDER BY priority DESC
			LIMIT 1
		")

$wpdb->get_row("
			SELECT * FROM $wpgmza_tblname_categories
			WHERE id = " . $ids[0] . "
			AND active = 0
			LIMIT 1
		")

printf( __('WP Go Maps: You have selected the Google Maps engine, but the Google Maps API is not being loaded for the following reason: %s.
We recommend you uncheck "Do not load Google Maps API" and set "Load Maps Engine API" to "Where Required" in your maps settings page', 'wp-google-maps'), $status->message, admin_url('admin.php?page=wp-google-maps-menu-settings') )
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $wpgmza_tblname GROUP BY map_id, lat, lng, address, title, link, description")
$wpdb->get_col("SELECT MIN(id) FROM $wpgmza_tblname GROUP BY map_id, lat, lng, address, title, link, description")
$wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(id) FROM $wpgmza_tblname WHERE latlng IS NULL LIMIT 1")
$wpdb->query("UPDATE ".$wpgmza_tblname." SET latlng={$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}PointFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', CAST(lat AS DECIMAL(18,10)), ' ', CAST(lng AS DECIMAL(18,10)), ')'))")
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $wpgmza_tblname_poly WHERE `map_id` = %d ORDER BY `id` DESC", intval($map_id)) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to perform this function', 'wp-google-maps' ) )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
                "UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_maps SET
                map_title = %s,
                map_width = %s,
                map_height = %s,
                map_start_lat = %f,
                map_start_lng = %f,
                map_start_location = %s,
                map_start_zoom = %d,
                type = %d,
                bicycle = %d,
                traffic = %d,
                alignment = %d,
                map_width_type = %s,
                map_height_type = %s,
                other_settings = %s
                WHERE id = %d",

                $map_title,
                $map_width,
                $map_height,
                $map_start_lat,
                $map_start_lng,
                $map_start_location,
                $map_start_zoom,
                $type,
                $bicycle_enabled,
                $traffic_enabled,
                $alignment,
                $map_width_type,
                $map_height_type,
                $other_settings_data,
                $map_id)
        )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to perform this function', 'wp-google-maps' ) )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to perform this function', 'wp-google-maps' ) )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(
                        "INSERT INTO $wpgmza_tblname_poly SET
                        map_id = %d,
                        polydata = %s,
                        innerpolydata = %s,
                        polyname = %s,
                        linecolor = %s,
                        lineopacity = %s,
                        fillcolor = %s,
                        opacity = %s,
                        ohlinecolor = %s,
                        ohfillcolor = %s,
                        ohopacity = %s
                        ",

                        $mid,
                        $wpgmaps_polydata,
                        $wpgmaps_polydatainner,
                        $polyname,
                        $linecolor,
                        $line_opacity,
                        $fillcolor,
                        $opacity,
                        $ohlinecolor,
                        $ohfillcolor,
                        $ohopacity
                    )
                )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to perform this function', 'wp-google-maps' ) )

                    "UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_poly SET
                    polydata = %s,

                    lineopacity = %s,
                    fillcolor = %s,
                    opacity = %s,

                    ohfillcolor = %s,

                    ,

                    $wpgmaps_polydata,
                    $wpgmaps_polydatainner,
                    $polyname,
                    $linecolor,
                    $line_opacity,
                    $fillcolor,
                    $opacity,
                    $ohlinecolor,
                    $ohfillcolor,
                    $ohopacity,
                    $pid
                )
            )
wp_die( __( 'You do not have permission to perform this function', 'wp-google-maps' ) )

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare(

printf( /* translators: %s: WP Go Maps Settings Link */ __("We have detected a conflict between your current theme's version and our plugin. Should you be experiencing issues with your maps displaying, please update Avada to version 3.9.4 or go to settings page and check the highlighted checkbox.", "wp-google-maps"), admin_url('/admin.php?page=wp-google-maps-menu-settings#wpgmza_settings_force_jquery') )

printf( /* translators: %s: WP Go Maps Settings Link */ __("We have detected a conflict between your current theme's version and our plugin. Should you be experiencing issues with your maps displaying, please update Avada to version 3.9.4 or go to settings page and check the highlighted checkbox.", "wp-google-maps"), admin_url('/admin.php?page=wp-google-maps-menu-settings#wpgmza_settings_force_jquery') )
$wpdb->query("ALTER TABLE $table_name CONVERT TO CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci")
$wpdb->query("ALTER TABLE $wpgmza_tblname CHANGE `category` `category` VARCHAR(500) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL DEFAULT '0'")

			SELECT * FROM $wpgmza_tblname_categories

		")

sanitizers.expression: $wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $WPGMZA_TABLE_NAME_MARKERS WHERE approved=1 AND map_id=%d", array($this->id))
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $wpgmza_tblname_poly WHERE `map_id` = %d ORDER BY `id` DESC", intval($map_id))

$wpdb->prepare(
                "UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_maps SET
                map_title = %s,
                map_width = %s,
                map_height = %s,
                map_start_lat = %f,
                map_start_lng = %f,
                map_start_location = %s,
                map_start_zoom = %d,
                type = %d,
                bicycle = %d,
                traffic = %d,
                alignment = %d,
                map_width_type = %s,
                map_height_type = %s,
                other_settings = %s
                WHERE id = %d",

                $map_title,
                $map_width,
                $map_height,
                $map_start_lat,
                $map_start_lng,
                $map_start_location,
                $map_start_zoom,
                $type,
                $bicycle_enabled,
                $traffic_enabled,
                $alignment,
                $map_width_type,
                $map_height_type,
                $other_settings_data,
                $map_id)

$wpdb->prepare(
                        "INSERT INTO $wpgmza_tblname_poly SET
                        map_id = %d,
                        polydata = %s,
                        innerpolydata = %s,
                        polyname = %s,
                        linecolor = %s,
                        lineopacity = %s,
                        fillcolor = %s,
                        opacity = %s,
                        ohlinecolor = %s,
                        ohfillcolor = %s,
                        ohopacity = %s
                        ",

                        $mid,
                        $wpgmaps_polydata,
                        $wpgmaps_polydatainner,
                        $polyname,
                        $linecolor,
                        $line_opacity,
                        $fillcolor,
                        $opacity,
                        $ohlinecolor,
                        $ohfillcolor,
                        $ohopacity
                    )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    "UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_poly SET
                    polydata = %s,
                    innerpolydata = %s,
                    polyname = %s,
                    linecolor = %s,
                    lineopacity = %s,
                    fillcolor = %s,
                    opacity = %s,
                    ohlinecolor = %s,
                    ohfillcolor = %s,
                    ohopacity = %s
                    WHERE `id` = %d"
                    ,

                    $wpgmaps_polydata,
                    $wpgmaps_polydatainner,
                    $polyname,
                    $linecolor,
                    $line_opacity,
                    $fillcolor,
                    $opacity,
                    $ohlinecolor,
                    $ohfillcolor,
                    $ohopacity,
                    $pid
                )

$wpdb->prepare(
                        "INSERT INTO $wpgmza_tblname_polylines SET
                        map_id = %d,
                        polydata = %s,
                        polyname = %s,
                        linecolor = %s,
                        linethickness = %s,
                        opacity = %s
                        ",

                        $mid,
                        $wpgmaps_polydata,
                        $polyname,
                        $linecolor,
                        $linethickness,
                        $opacity
                    )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    "UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_polylines SET
                    polydata = %s,
                    polyname = %s,
                    linecolor = %s,
                    linethickness = %s,
                    opacity = %s
                    WHERE `id` = %d"
                    ,

                    $wpgmaps_polydata,
                    $polyname,
                    $linecolor,
                    $linethickness,
                    $opacity,
                    $pid
                )

$wpdb->prepare("
				UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_circles SET
				center = {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}GeomFromText(%s),
				name = %s,
				color = %s,
				opacity = %f,
				radius = %f
				WHERE id = %d
			", array(
				"POINT($center)",
				sanitize_text_field($_POST['circle_name']),
				sanitize_hex_color($_POST['circle_color']),
				floatval($_POST['circle_opacity']),
				intval($_POST['circle_radius']),
				intval($_POST['circle_id'])
			))

$wpdb->prepare("
				INSERT INTO $wpgmza_tblname_circles
				(center, map_id, name, color, opacity, radius)
				VALUES
				({$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}GeomFromText(%s), %d, %s, %s, %f, %f)
			", array(
				"POINT($center)",
				intval($_POST['wpgmaps_map_id']),
				sanitize_text_field($_POST['circle_name']),
				sanitize_hex_color($_POST['circle_color']),
				floatval($_POST['circle_opacity']),
				intval($_POST['circle_radius'])
			))

$wpdb->prepare("
				UPDATE $wpgmza_tblname_rectangles SET
				name = %s,
				color = %s,
				opacity = %f,
				cornerA = {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}GeomFromText(%s),
				cornerB = {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}GeomFromText(%s)
				WHERE id = %d
			", array(
				sanitize_text_field($_POST['rectangle_name']),
				sanitize_hex_color($_POST['rectangle_color']),
				floatval($_POST['rectangle_opacity']),
				$cornerA,
				$cornerB,
				intval($_POST['rectangle_id'])
			))

$wpdb->prepare("
				INSERT INTO $wpgmza_tblname_rectangles
				(map_id, name, color, opacity, cornerA, cornerB)
				VALUES
				(%d, %s, %s, %f, {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}GeomFromText(%s), {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}GeomFromText(%s))
			", array(
				intval($_POST['wpgmaps_map_id']),
				sanitize_text_field($_POST['rectangle_name']),
				sanitize_hex_color($_POST['rectangle_color']),
				floatval($_POST['rectangle_opacity']),
				$cornerA,
				$cornerB
			))
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT *, {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}AsText(center) AS center FROM $wpgmza_tblname_circles WHERE map_id=%d", array($map_id))

$wpdb->prepare("SELECT *, {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}AsText(cornerA) AS cornerA, {$wpgmza->spatialFunctionPrefix}AsText(cornerB) AS cornerB FROM $wpgmza_tblname_rectangles WHERE map_id=%d", array($map_id))
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT response FROM {$this->table} WHERE query=%s LIMIT 1", array($query))
esc_attr( __('Move this marker to another map', 'wp-google-maps') )
esc_attr( __('Center the map to this feature', 'wp-google-maps') )

			SELECT * FROM $wpgmza_tblname_categories
			WHERE id IN (" . implode(',', $ids) . ")
			AND active = 0
			ORDER BY priority DESC
			LIMIT 1
		")
